payload.label: outlet
payload.long_description: White plastic dual-socket wall outlet with two vertical rectangular receptacles and a centered mounting screw; faceplate fills most of the crop, shows light surface smudging and minor scuffing, wall-mounted and viewed from close distance (approximately 0.4 m from camera).
